species: we utilized an HR-based CRISPR knock-in strategy to insert an SFB tag to the N terminus of RIF1 at its endogenous genomic loci in human embryonic kidney 293T (293T) cells
cell_type: we utilized an HR-based CRISPR knock-in strategy to insert an SFB tag to the N terminus of RIF1 at its endogenous genomic loci in human embryonic kidney 293T (293T) cells
disease_state: we found that loss of ASF1 resulted in resistance to poly (ADP-ribose) polymerase (PARP) inhibition in BRCA1-deficient cells
sample_source: we generated stable LentiV2 mock guide RNA transfected control cells and ASF1A, ASF1B, ASF1A + ASF1B, and RIF1 single-guide RNA (sgRNA) knockdown cells in RPE1 FLAG-Cas9 P53−/− BRCA1−/− cells
cell_line: we utilized an HR-based CRISPR knock-in strategy to insert an SFB tag to the N terminus of RIF1 at its endogenous genomic loci in human embryonic kidney 293T (293T) cells
